sentence: El cel no està clar hui.
ipa: ˈel ˈsel ˈno eˈsta ˈklaɾ ˈuj
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Valencian 'hui' (today) [ˈuj] and full atonic vowels per avl2006; final-⟨r⟩ retention 'clar' [ˈklaɾ] per recasens1991.

sentence: Esta vesprada plou damunt la ciutat.
ipa: ˈesta veˈspɾaða ˈplow ðaˈmun ˈla siˈwtat
gloss_en: This afternoon it is raining over the city.
notes: Demonstrative 'esta' and 'vesprada' (afternoon) per avl2006; full atonic ⟨e/o⟩ vowels (no schwa) per recasens1991.

sentence: Les cases velles tenen finestres grosses.
ipa: ˈles ˈkazez ˈveʎes ˈtenen fiˈnestɾez ˈɣɾoses
gloss_en: The old houses have big windows.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'velles' and full atonic vowels per recasens1991; final ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] before vowel 'cases velles' (sandhi) per avl2006.

sentence: On està l'espill de la cambra?
ipa: ˈon eˈsta leˈspiʎ ˈde ˈla ˈkambɾa
gloss_en: Where is the mirror of the room?
notes: Valencian lexicon 'espill' (mirror) with palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] per avl2006; full atonic vowels 'cambra' per recasens1991.

sentence: El meu germà viu a la vora de la plaça.
ipa: ˈel ˈmew ðʒeˈɾma ˈviw ˈa ˈla ˈvoɾa ˈðe ˈla ˈplasa
gloss_en: My brother lives by the edge of the square.
notes: Voiced prepalatal ⟨g⟩ affricate [dʒ] 'germà' and phonemic labiodental ⟨v⟩ [v] 'viu','vora' per avl2006; final-⟨r⟩ retention 'germà'-class per recasens1991.

sentence: La reunió és demà a les tres.
ipa: ˈla rewniˈo ˈez ðeˈma ˈa ˈles ˈtɾes
gloss_en: The meeting is tomorrow at three.
notes: Copula ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] 'és demà' (sandhi) and trill [r] 'tres' per recasens1991; full atonic vowels per avl2006.

sentence: Vine ací de seguida i agarra la granera.
ipa: ˈvine aˈsi ˈðe seˈɣiða ˈi aˈɣara ˈla ɣɾaˈneɾa
gloss_en: Come here at once and grab the broom.
notes: Valencian adverb 'ací' and 'granera' (broom) per avl2006; tap/trill and final-⟨r⟩ retention 'agarra','granera' per recasens1991.

sentence: Quinze taronges i dotze pomes valen deu euros.
ipa: ˈkinze taˈɾoɲdʒez ˈi ˈðodze ˈpomez ˈvalen ˈdew ˈewɾos
gloss_en: Fifteen oranges and twelve apples cost ten euros.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ny⟩ [ɲ] with voiced affricate 'taronges' and phonemic ⟨v⟩ [v] 'valen' per avl2006; voiced ⟨tz/dz⟩ 'dotze' per recasens1991.

sentence: El gos corre per la vora del riu.
ipa: ˈel ˈɣos ˈkore ˈpeɾ ˈla ˈvoɾa ˈðel ˈriw
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Final-⟨r⟩ retention 'per' [ˈpeɾ] and phonemic ⟨v⟩ [v] 'vora' per recasens1991; trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'corre' per avl2006.

sentence: La dona menja pa amb oli.
ipa: ˈla ˈðona ˈmeɲdʒa ˈpa ˈam ˈoli
gloss_en: The woman eats bread with oil.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨nj⟩ [ɲ] 'menja' and full atonic vowels 'dona','oli' per recasens1991; final ⟨b⟩→[m] 'amb' assimilation (sandhi) per avl2006.

sentence: Aquell xiquet ix de casa de matí.
ipa: aˈkeʎ tʃiˈked ˈjʒ ˈðe ˈkaza ˈðe maˈti
gloss_en: That lad leaves the house in the morning.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'aquell', Valencian 'xiquet' (boy) and verb 'ix' (eixir, to leave) [ˈjʒ] per avl2006; full atonic vowels per recasens1991.

sentence: No crec que faça sol esta setmana.
ipa: ˈno ˈkɾek ˈke ˈfasa ˈsol ˈesta seˈtmana
gloss_en: I do not think it will be sunny this week.
notes: Subjunctive 'faça' and demonstrative 'esta' per avl2006; full atonic vowels 'sol','setmana' per recasens1991.

sentence: La muntanya està plena de neu enguany.
ipa: ˈla muˈntaɲa eˈsta ˈplena ˈðe ˈnew eˈnɡwaɲ
gloss_en: The mountain is full of snow this year.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ny⟩ [ɲ] 'muntanya','enguany' and full atonic vowels per recasens1991; 'enguany' (this year) per avl2006.

sentence: Els xiquets menuts jueguen al carrer.
ipa: ˈels tʃiˈkedz meˈnudz ˈðʒueɣen ˈal kaˈreɾ
gloss_en: The little children play in the street.
notes: Valencian 'xiquets menuts' and 'jueguen' (play) with voiced affricate [dʒ] per avl2006; final ⟨ts⟩ [dz] 'xiquets','menuts' and final-⟨r⟩ retention 'carrer' per recasens1991.

sentence: Puja les escales i obri la finestra.
ipa: ˈpudʒa ˈlez eˈskalez ˈi ˈoβɾi ˈla fiˈnestɾa
gloss_en: Go up the stairs and open the window.
notes: Voiced affricate ⟨j⟩ [dʒ] 'puja' and imperative 'obri' per avl2006; final ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] 'les escales' (sandhi) per recasens1991.

sentence: Quanta gent ha vingut a la festa?
ipa: ˈkwanta ˈðʒent ˈa viˈnɡut ˈa ˈla ˈfesta
gloss_en: How many people have come to the party?
notes: Voiced prepalatal ⟨g⟩ affricate [dʒ] 'gent' and phonemic ⟨v⟩ [v] 'vingut' per avl2006; full atonic vowels 'quanta','festa' per recasens1991.

sentence: El pont de fusta travessa el barranc.
ipa: ˈel ˈpon ˈde ˈfusta tɾaˈvesa ˈel βaˈraŋk
gloss_en: The wooden bridge crosses the ravine.
notes: Velar nasal [ŋ] before ⟨c⟩ 'barranc' [βaˈraŋk] (final ⟨c⟩ retained, unlike North-Western) per recasens1991; phonemic ⟨v⟩ [v] 'travessa' per avl2006.

sentence: Sent la pluja caure damunt les teulades.
ipa: ˈsen ˈla ˈpludʒa ˈkawɾe ðaˈmun ˈles teˈwlaðes
gloss_en: I hear the rain falling on the roofs.
notes: Voiced prepalatal ⟨j⟩ [dʒ] 'pluja' and full atonic vowels 'teulades' per recasens1991; final ⟨t⟩ loss 'sent' [ˈsen] per avl2006.

sentence: Bon dia, com va la vida per ací?
ipa: ˈbon ˈdia ˈkom ˈva ˈla ˈviða ˈpeɾ aˈsi
gloss_en: Good morning, how is life around here?
notes: Phonemic ⟨v⟩ [v] 'va','vida' and adverb 'ací' with final-⟨r⟩ retention 'per' [ˈpeɾ] per avl2006; full atonic vowels per recasens1991.

sentence: La meua filla porta un vestit roig.
ipa: ˈla ˈmewa ˈfiʎa ˈpoɾta ˈun veˈstid ˈrotʃ
gloss_en: My daughter is wearing a red dress.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'filla', possessive 'meua' and 'roig' [ˈrotʃ] per avl2006; final-⟨r⟩ retention 'porta' and phonemic ⟨v⟩ [v] 'vestit' per recasens1991.
